subject: General Awareness
question_text: Which sequence correctly represents the typical funding progression of a startup from early to later stages?

options.text: Venture Capital → Angel Investment → Bootstrapping → Private Equity
Bootstrapping → Angel Investment → Venture Capital → Private Equity
Angel Investment → Bootstrapping → Venture Capital → IPO
Private Equity → Venture Capital → Angel Investment → Bootstrapping

solution.final_answer: Bootstrapping → Angel Investment → Venture Capital → Private Equity

explanation.concept: Funding follows startup maturity from internal funds to institutional investors.
step_by_step: Angel investors provide early-stage external capital.
PE firms invest in mature stages.
